name: Agent Optimizer
description: Audit, plan, apply, roll back, and security-scan your OpenClaw config through the agent-optimizer CLI. The mutating tools (apply, rollback) are approval-gated.

cliPath.description: Path or command name of the agent-optimizer CLI — a SINGLE executable (default: `agent-optimizer` on PATH). It is run directly with shell:false, so it must be one path/command with NO arguments and NO shell syntax; the whole string (spaces included) is treated as the filename.
